profile.description: MHF® I Micro RF Coaxial Connector (SMT receptacle) — DC to 9 GHz, 50 Ω characteristic impedance, 3.1×3.0 mm SMT footprint, mated height 2.5 mm max. Used in 5G sub-6, Wi-Fi 6E, LTE/LTE-Advanced, LPWA, Bluetooth, and GPS applications.

absolute_max.mated_height: 2.5 mm max (standard), 3.0 mm max (2.0 mm cable OD variant), 2.9 mm max (LK locking variant)

pins.name: RF
pins.requirements: Connect to 50 Ω controlled-impedance PCB trace. Keep trace as short as possible and avoid vias near the pad.

pins.name: GND1
pins.requirements: Must be connected directly to continuous ground plane with multiple vias for low-inductance RF ground return.

pins.name: GND2
pins.requirements: Must be connected directly to continuous ground plane with multiple vias for low-inductance RF ground return.

application_circuits.name: Antenna connection for Wi-Fi / Bluetooth module
application_circuits.description: Receptacle (20279-001E-03) soldered on PCB. Center pad (RF) connects to 50 Ω microstrip trace from the RF IC. Both outer pads (GND1, GND2) stitched to ground plane. MHF-I-to-MHF-I coaxial harness (e.g. 8-24-0114, OD=1.13 mm, L=100 mm) connects module to antenna or test port.

application_circuits.name: GPS antenna feed
application_circuits.description: Same receptacle footprint. 50 Ω trace from GPS receiver IC output to MHF-I center pad. Outer pads to ground. Short harness (L=50 mm) routes to external GPS patch antenna.

common_mistakes: Ground pads not stitched to ground plane with sufficient vias — causes high-impedance RF ground and degrades VSWR
Center pad trace not 50 Ω controlled impedance — causes reflections and insertion loss above 3 GHz
Using too long a harness — insertion loss increases with cable length; use shortest harness that fits
Confusing 3-pad (20279-001E-03) and 4-pad (20441-001E-01) receptacle footprints — they are not interchangeable
Mating the LK (locking) plug variant with a non-LK receptacle — the locking feature requires the matching receptacle
profile.notes: Part 20279-001E-03 = standard SMT receptacle, 3 pads. Part 20441-001E-01 = SMT receptacle, 4 pads (black or natural housing). The MHF-I plug harness is available in cable OD 0.81/1.13/1.32/1.37/1.80/2.00 mm. i-Fit® solderless termination provides consistent RF performance. Compliant with 5G sub-6 GHz, Wi-Fi 6E (6 GHz), LTE/LTE-Advanced, LPWA, Bluetooth, and GPS frequency bands.
profile.extraction_note: Catalog document covers full MHF® I series; profile represents the SMT receptacle (3-pad) — the PCB-mounted component. Part number set to series name MHF-I as no single overriding part number exists.

footprint.name: MHF-I
footprint.description: I-PEX MHF-I SMT RF Coaxial Receptacle, 3-pad, DC–9 GHz, 50 Ω, 3.1×3.0 mm (20279-001E-03)
